wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q328187 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Ad Dali' Governorate to en:Dhale Governorate
محافظة الضالع - an affected OSM element that may be improved
? -> en:Dhale Governorate
Dhale Governorate

تعز - an affected OSM element that may be improved
? -> en:Taiz

? -> en:Saada

Q20416326 may be added as wikidata tag based on wikipedia tag
دمقوت - an affected OSM element that may be improved

مديرية رحبة - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q20382126 may be added as wikidata tag based on wikipedia tag
منطقة بن طهيف وضواحيها - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(1218204505)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'='ar:دمقوت (المهرة)']; relation(9874966)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'='en: Rahabah']; way(1046992001)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'='ar:آل_بن_طهيف_(يافع)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikidata from wikipedia tag']


wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
محافظة لحج - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(383892)['wikidata'='Q388318']['wikipedia'='ar:لحج (محافظة)']['wikipedia:en'='Lahij Governorate']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']
